# Conway Connects

> Conway Connects provides expert credit repair and business funding services. We dispute inaccurate, incomplete, and fraudulent items on your credit report, helping clients achieve an average 40-point credit score improvement in 4–6 months.

## About

Conway Connects was founded by Jonathan Jason Weaver-Conway. The company specializes in credit repair under the Fair Credit Reporting Act (FCRA) and the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), and business funding solutions for entrepreneurs and small business owners.

## Services

- **Credit Repair:** Dispute inaccurate items across Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Average 40-point improvement in 4–6 months.
- **Business Funding:** Business credit profile setup, credit stacking, SBA loans, and access to $50K–$250K in capital.

## Key Pages

- Homepage: https://conwayconnects.com
- Free Credit Audit: https://conwayconnects.com/#audit

## Audience

Individuals with damaged credit, entrepreneurs needing business funding, and small business owners at any credit score range.
